title: Software Development Engineer in Test - 1
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Software Development Engineer in Test \\- 1
   

  

**Location** 
 : Bengaluru
   

  

**What's the role?**
 We are looking for a Software Development Engineer in Test \\- 1 to join our team at Jar in Bengaluru. As a Quality Assurance Tester, you will be responsible for ensuring that our products and applications meet the required quality standards before they are released. You will be conducting manual testing across multiple platforms and working closely with cross\\-functional teams to identify, prioritize, and address defects and bugs.
   

  

**What will be your responsibilities?**
 Perform manual testing of mobile applications and APIs to ensure quality standards.
   

  

 Design, maintain, and execute test cases based on business and functional requirements.
   

  

 Log and track bugs using tools like Jira, identifying discrepancies between expected and actual results.
   

  

 Participate in daily stand\\-ups and sprint ceremonies to share QA updates and raise concerns early.
   

  

 Actively engage in the entire software test life cycle (STLC).
   

  

 Collaborate with developers, designers, and product managers to improve feature quality and user experience.
   

  

 Execute smoke, regression, and exploratory testing across different platforms and devices.
   

  

 Assist in root cause analysis and provide clear defect reports.
   

  

**What’s required from you?**
 1–3 years of hands\\-on experience in manual testing of API and mobile apps.
   

  

 Familiarity with STLC, Java and basic SDET concepts.
   

  

 Basic knowledge of tools like Postman, Charles Proxy, or Proxyman.
   

  

 Strong debugging skills and a systematic approach to problem\\-solving.
   

  

 Comfortable writing test cases and test plans from scratch.
   

  

 Basic competence in writing and executing SQL/MongoDB queries.
   

  

 Exposure to bug tracking systems like Jira.
   

  

 Self\\-motivated, detail\\-oriented, and capable of working in a fast\\-paced environment.
   

  

 Good communication and collaboration skills.
   

  

 A Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science, Engineering, or a closely related field.

**About BNP Paribas Group**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. It operates in 65 countries and has nearly 185,000 employees, including more than 145,000 in Europe. The Group has key positions in its three main fields of activity: Commercial, Personal Banking \\& Services for the Group’s commercial \\& personal banking and several specialized businesses including BNP Paribas Personal Finance and Arval; Investment \\& Protection Services for savings, investment, and protection solutions; and Corporate \\& Institutional Banking, focused on corporate and institutional clients. Based on its strong diversified and integrated model, the Group helps all its clients (individuals, community associations, entrepreneurs, SMEs, corporates and institutional clients) to realize their projects through solutions spanning financing, investment, savings and protection insurance. In Europe, BNP Paribas has four domestic markets: Belgium, France, Italy, and Luxembourg. The Group is rolling out its integrated commercial \\& personal banking model across several Mediterranean countries, Turkey, and Eastern Europe. As a key player in international banking, the Group has leading platforms and business lines in Europe, a strong presence in the Americas as well as a solid and fast\\-growing business in Asia\\-Pacific. BNP Paribas has implemented a Corporate Social Responsibility approach in all its activities, enabling it to contribute to the construction of a sustainable future, while ensuring the Group's performance and stability.
   

  

**About BNP Paribas India Solutions**
 Established in 2005, BNP Paribas India Solutions is a wholly owned subsidiary of BNP Paribas SA, European Union’s leading bank with an international reach. With delivery centers located in Bengaluru, Chennai and Mumbai, we are a 24x7 global delivery center. India Solutions services three business lines: Corporate and Institutional Banking, Investment Solutions and Retail Banking for BNP Paribas across the Group. Driving innovation and growth, we are harnessing the potential of over 10000 employees, to provide support and develop best\\-in\\-class solutions.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At BNP Paribas, we passionately embrace diversity and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all employees are valued, respected and can bring their authentic selves to work. We prohibit Discrimination and Harassment of any kind and our policies promote equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants, irrespective of, but not limited to their gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, ethnicity, race, colour, national origin, age, religion, social status, mental or physical disabilities, veteran status etc. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in. title: Software Engineer- Mobile App iOS/Android
description:
**Role:** 
 Software Engineer\\- Mobile App iOS/Android
 



**Location:** 
 Remote
 



**Type:** 
 Full\\-time
 



**Experience:** 
 Freshers allowed
 



  





 We're a small but mighty team building cool stuff in the AI data space — and we're looking for a Mobile App Developer who can work across both iOS and Android to help us grow our core data collection platform. If you love clean code, smooth UX, and want your work to actually matter — keep reading.
 



  





 🚀 What You'll Be Building
 



 Our app is used by real people, in real locations, doing real tasks — all captured as egocentric video data that powers AI systems. You'll be working on features like:
 


* Task selection \\& guided video recording flows
* Secure video upload to cloud storage (AWS S3\\) with metadata handling
* A quality review pipeline where users can track their submission stages, approvals \\& feedback
* Device compatibility checks to ensure only supported phone models can record
* Location verification to ensure users are within the project scope
* Secure authentication via verified or alias email signup
* Strict in\\-app video security — no exports, no leaks



  





**🛠️ What We're Looking For** 



* Solid experience with
 **Swift / SwiftUI** 
 (iOS) and
 **Kotlin / Jetpack Compose** 
 (Android)
* Experience with cross\\-platform frameworks like
 **Flutter or React Native** 
 is a big plus
* Familiarity with REST APIs and cloud storage (S3 or similar)
* Understanding of video recording APIs —
 **AVFoundation** 
 (iOS) /
 **Camera2 / CameraX** 
 (Android)
* Bonus: experience with location services, device verification, or data privacy



  





**🌟 Why Rilith?** 



* 100% remote — work from anywhere
* Small team \\= big ownership, your ideas actually ship
* You're not just writing code, you're contributing to real AI datasets
* Chill, collaborative culture — no corporate nonsense

title: Development Engineer 3
description:
Comcast brings together the best in media and technology. We drive innovation to create the world's best entertainment and online experiences. As a Fortune 50 leader, we set the pace in a variety of innovative and fascinating businesses and create career opportunities across a wide range of locations and disciplines. We are at the forefront of change and move at an amazing pace, thanks to our remarkable people, who bring cutting\\-edge products and services to life for millions of customers every day. If you share in our passion for teamwork, our vision to revolutionize industries and our goal to lead the future in media and technology, we want you to fast\\-forward your career at Comcast.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 This job involves collaborative design and development of software solutions that meet business objectives. It includes system requirement analysis, application customization, and assisting with software updates. It also involves mentoring junior engineers, ensuring quality with Quality Assurance, and providing technical leadership on routine projects. The job is also responsible for conducting training for application users.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Position: Development Engineer 3
   

  

 Experience: 5 years to 7\\.5 years
   

  

 Job Location: Chennai Tamil Nadu
   

  

**Mandatory Skills**
 PHP, Python, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, REST API integration and API development
   

  

 AJAX, jQuery
   

  

 Oracle database
   

  

 UX \\- addon
   

  

**Skills**
 Python (moderate level)
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to design, develop, and integrate innovative software solutions that align with business needs
* Conducting analysis of system requirements and the customization of applications to ensure optimal functionality
* Assisting with the software update process for existing applications and roll\\-outs of software releases
* Mentoring junior engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and shared knowledge within the team
* Engaging with Quality Assurance to verify that software meets technical specifications and delivering high\\-quality, reliable applications
* Troubleshooting and resolving complex technical issues in software applications and systems
* Synthesizing market research and industry trends to inform project strategies and enhance product offerings
* Conducting training sessions for operational staff to ensure effective use of internally developed applications
* Consistent exercise of independent judgment and discretion in matters of significance.
* Regular, consistent and punctual attendance. Must be able to work nights and weekends, variable schedule(s) as necessary.
* Other duties and responsibilities as assigned.


**Employees At All Levels Are Expected To**
* Understand our Operating Principles; make them the guidelines for how you do your job.
* Own the customer experience think and act in ways that put our customers first, give them seamless digital options at every touchpoint, and make them promoters of our products and services.
* Know your stuff be enthusiastic learners, users and advocates of our game\\-changing technology, products and services, especially our digital tools and experiences.
* Win as a team make big things happen by working together and being open to new ideas.
* Be an active part of the Net Promoter System a way of working that brings more employee and customer feedback into the company by joining huddles, making call backs and helping us elevate opportunities to do better for our customers.
* Drive results and growth.
* Support a culture of inclusion in how you work and lead.
* Do what's right for each other, our customers, investors and our communities.


**Disclaimer:** 
 This information has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees in this role. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities and qualifications.
   

  

 Comcast is an equal opportunity workplace. We will consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, genetic information, or any other basis protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Base pay is one part of the Total Rewards that Comcast provides to compensate and recognize employees for their work. Most sales positions are eligible for a Commission under the terms of an applicable plan, while most non\\-sales positions are eligible for a Bonus. Additionally, Comcast provides best\\-in\\-class Benefits to eligible employees. We believe that benefits should connect you to the support you need when it matters most, and should help you care for those who matter most. That’s why we provide an array of options, expert guidance and always\\-on tools, that are personalized to meet the needs of your reality \\- to help support you physically, financially and emotionally through the big milestones and in your everyday life. Please visit the compensation and benefits summary on our careers site for more details.
   

  

**Education**
 Bachelor's Degree
   

  

 While possessing the stated degree is preferred, Comcast also may consider applicants who hold some combination of coursework and experience, or who have extensive related professional experience.
   

  

**Relevant Work Experience**
 5\\-7 Years

title: Sr. Software Engineer - Power BI Job
description:

 **Manufacturing, Finance Squad and Next Gen, MFG\\_AEPH**
**Skills**
* Expertise in Power BI; Microsoft Data Analyst Certification is a strong plus.
* Proficiency in DAX, SQL, and Microsoft Excel.
* Experience with BI suites (Power BI, SSRS, Tableau, QlikView) and data storytelling.
* Experience with SQL BI development (SSIS, SSRS, SSAS, T\\-SQL).
* Familiarity with DW technologies like Databricks, Azure Synapse, and Azure DevOps.
* Experience of ETL processes for structured and unstructured data.
* Strong communication and stakeholder engagement.

**Requirements \\& Solutioning**

* Translate business requirements into actionable BI solutions.
* Report \\& Dashboard Development
* Independently develop reports and dashboards using Power BI and other BI tools.

**User Enablement \\& Training**

* Promote a data\\-driven culture through workshops, meetings, and internal initiatives.


**Access Control \\& Governance**
* Manage admin\\-level access control for data and reports across the organization.
* Maintain compliance with security and governance standards.


**Innovation \\& Advanced Analytics**
* Identify opportunities for applying advanced analytics, including machine learning and IoT.
* Collaborate with data engineering teams for ETL and data warehouse integration.


**Operational Readiness**
* Support field activities as needed, ensuring smooth deployment and adoption of BI solutions.


**Accountability**
**Required Behavioral Competencies**
* Takes responsibility for and ensures accuracy of own work, as well as the work and deadlines of the team.


**Collaboration**

**Agility**
* Demonstrates a willingness to accept and embrace differing ideas or perceptions which are beneficial to the organization.


**Customer Focus**
* Displays awareness of customers stated needs and gives priority to meeting and exceeding customer expectations at or above expected quality within stipulated time.


**Communication**
* Targets communications for the appropriate audience, clearly articulating and presenting his/her position or decision.


**Drives Results**
* Sets realistic stretch goals for self \\& others to achieve and exceed defined goals/targets.


**Certifications**
 Good To Have
   

  

 At YASH, you are empowered to create a career that will take you to where you want to go while working in an inclusive team environment. We leverage career\\-oriented skilling models and optimize our collective intelligence aided with technology for continuous learning, unlearning, and relearning at a rapid pace and scale.
